mapper.sql: select s.submit_id, s.homework_id, s.student_id, s.file_name, CONCAT(h.storage_path, '/', s.file_name) as file_path, s.submit_time, s.score, s.comment, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time, st.student_name, st.account, h.title as homework_title from stu_homework_submit s left join stu_student st on st.student_id = s.student_id left join stu_homework h on h.homework_id = s.homework_id
mapper.insert: insert into stu_homework_submit ( homework_id, student_id, file_name, submit_time, score, comment, status, create_time ) values ( #{homeworkId}, #{studentId}, #{fileName}, #{submitTime}, #{score}, #{comment}, #{status}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from stu_homework_submit where submit_id in
#{submitId}
